source_jobs.title: Senior APAC Growth Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
Quicknode is a cloud-based infrastructure company that powers the blockchain ecosystem.

Our mission is to be the indispensable utility that empowers companies and innovators globally to build next-generation, Web3 enabled businesses & applications using blockchain technology. Quicknode is backed by some of the world's best investors including Tiger Global, Y Combinator, SoftBank, and the Seven Seven Six Fund. The Quicknode team has over 120 people maintaining high performance global data infrastructure for amazing customers serving billions of requests daily.

We are a global remote company with an HQ in Miami, Florida.


THE ROLE

This is Quicknode's first dedicated APAC marketing hire. You'll be building from the ground up — establishing our presence, testing channels, and proving the regional growth model. If you want a playbook handed to you, this isn't the role. If you want to write the playbook, keep reading.

As the Growth Marketing Manager, you will be the regional owner for growth marketing programs across APAC — combining digital execution (localized SEO and regional paid channels) with in-market community + event marketing to drive measurable pipeline outcomes. You will work closely with Marketing, Sales and DevRel to increase awareness, acquisition, and conversion in priority APAC markets while providing field intel to inform strategy.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own regional demand generation for the Self-Service segment and pipeline goals for the APAC Enterprise Segment (sourced pipeline targets, lead volume, and conversion improvements).

 - Plan and execute localized digital programs: SEO, landing pages, and content distribution for Korea, Japan and Singapore (and broader APAC as prioritized).

 - Manage and optimize regional paid channels and partnerships (e.g., Naver, Kakao, Coin98, Telegram & Discord communities, regional media placements).

 - Build relationships in developer communities and represent QuickNode at conferences, meetups, and ecosystem events in-region.

 - Develop an events & community calendar, run pre/during/post event motions, and ensure follow-up drives opportunities.

 - Serve as Quicknode's eyes and ears in APAC — deliver monthly competitive and market intelligence briefs covering competitor moves, emerging chains/protocols gaining regional traction, developer sentiment, and partnership opportunities.

 - Partner cross-functionally with Sales, Product Marketing, and DevRel to coordinate messaging, offers, and funnel handoff.

 - Set up dashboards and reporting for regional performance, including pipeline attribution and experiment learnings.


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 5+ years of experience in growth marketing, demand gen, or performance marketing.

 - B2B SaaS or Web3/blockchain infrastructure experience required. Familiarity with APAC crypto ecosystems, developer communities, and regional conference circuits strongly preferred.

 - Hands-on digital execution experience: SEO, paid acquisition, landing pages, experimentation, and analytics/reporting.

 - Strong interpersonal and networking skills; comfortable being “boots on the ground” at events and building community relationships.

 - Experience managing regional/channel-specific marketing programs and adapting messaging for local audiences.

 - Familiarity with APAC channels and platforms (e.g., Naver/Kakao in Korea, developer publishing communities in Japan, regional crypto/dev communities like Coin98/Telegram).

 - Fluency in English required. Proficiency in Korean, Japanese, or Mandarin is a strong advantage — or demonstrated experience localizing marketing programs for Northeast Asian markets.

 - Ability to work cross-functionally, influence without authority, and run structured experiments with clear measurement.

 - Excellent communication skills (written and verbal) and high ownership in a fast-moving environment.

source_jobs.title: Go To Market Operations Analyst
source_jobs.description:
Quicknode is a cloud-based infrastructure company that powers the blockchain ecosystem.

Our mission is to be the indispensable utility that empowers companies and innovators globally to build next-generation, Web3 enabled businesses & applications using blockchain technology. Quicknode is backed by some of the world's best investors including Tiger Global, Y Combinator, SoftBank, and the Seven Seven Six Fund. The Quicknode team has over 120 people maintaining high performance global data infrastructure for amazing customers serving billions of requests daily.

We are a global remote company with an HQ in Miami, Florida.


THE ROLE

As a Go To Market Operations Analyst, you’ll own the day-to-day execution layer of Quicknode’s revenue systems and help build the AI-native automation that makes that execution scalable. Salesforce administration, deal desk processing, comp cycle support, and tooling administration are the baseline. The differentiator is heavy use of Claude Code, n8n, and agentic workflows to automate routine work, surface anomalies, and replace headcount-heavy processes with leverage. The role reports into the Vice President of Go To Market and operates as the execution counterpart to the Staff Go To Market & AI Operations Manager.

This is a high-leverage seat for someone who treats every repetitive task as an automation opportunity. You won't just keep the revenue systems running, you'll systematically remove the manual work inside them, freeing the broader GTM org to operate at a scale that would otherwise require additional headcount. It's an ideal role for an operator who wants to go deep on AI-native revenue operations as Quicknode scales through its next stage of growth.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Salesforce Administration (AI-Leveraged)
   
   - Day-to-day SFDC admin: user provisioning, permission sets, list views, reports, dashboards.
   
   - Build and maintain custom objects, fields, validation rules, and flows under the architectural direction of Staff Go To Market & AI Operations Manager.
   
   - Use Claude Code and AI-assisted tooling to scale admin throughput: scripted bulk updates, automated data quality checks, agentic triage of support tickets.
   
   - Maintain pipeline hygiene automation (stale opportunity flags, missing field alerts, Rattle / Slack-native notifications).
   
   - Monitor integration health across Outreach ↔ SFDC, Gong ↔ SFDC, RevOps.io http://RevOps.io ↔ SFDC, HubSpot ↔ SFDC.

 - AI-Native Workflow Development
   
   - Build and maintain n8n automations for routing, enrichment, reporting, and recurring operational work.
   
   - Use Claude Code to ship internal tooling improvements directly into the Marketing and GTM Operations repos.
   
   - Prototype agentic workflows for lead enrichment, deal hygiene scans, forecast accuracy checks, and account intelligence surfacing.
   
   - Convert repeatable manual processes into automated workflows: every recurring ticket is a candidate for automation.
   
   - Maintain the internal n8n template library and document AI-first patterns for the Team.

 - Deal Desk & Commissions Support
   
   - Process inbound deal desk requests in RevOps.io http://RevOps.io CPQ: order form generation, SKU placement, pricing approvals, SFDC sync.
   
   - Verify contracts against margin thresholds and confirm correct term dates, SKU placement, drawdown rates before signature.
   
   - Support the quarterly commissions cycle: pull attainment data, run payout calculations under the Staff Go To Market & AI Operations Manager’s direction and coordinating with Finance.
   
   - Support new product launches: create SKUs, map to Salesforce products, update order form templates.

 - Tooling Administration
   
   - Day-to-day administration of the Go To Market stack: Apollo, Gong, Rattle, Clay, RingLead, LinkedIn Sales Navigator.
   
   - User provisioning, license management, seat optimization.
   
   - Run vendor support tickets to closure and surface renewal wind

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
Quicknode is a cloud-based infrastructure company that powers the blockchain ecosystem.

Our mission is to be the indispensable utility that empowers companies and innovators globally to build next-generation, Web3 enabled businesses & applications using blockchain technology. Quicknode is backed by some of the world's best investors including Tiger Global, Y Combinator, SoftBank, and the Seven Seven Six Fund. The Quicknode team has over 120 people maintaining high performance global data infrastructure for amazing customers serving billions of requests daily.

We are a global remote company with an HQ in Miami, Florida.

The Role

We are looking for a seasoned Business Development Representative looking to take the next step in their career by taking full ownership of the top of the funnel and be the point person for multiple Sales units across the Organization. As an added bonus, you will also be given the chance to hone your closing skills with some of our website’s plans. It’s a great opportunity for someone looking to gain closing experience and up-level into an Account Executive career path.

As a Business Development Representative focused on emerging markets, you’ll be on the front lines of our Product-Lead Growth (PLG) driven sales motion, engaging with innovative teams building in the decentralized world. QuickNode’s customer journey starts with self-serve plans and expands into higher tiers and enterprise solutions through product usage signals like API credits, requests per second (RPS), and support needs.

Your job will be to understand these signals, qualify opportunities, and help customers unlock more value from the platform. You’ll connect with blockchain protocols, dApps, DAOs, infrastructure providers, and other Web3-native organizations to understand their goals and educate them on how QuickNode can scale their mission. You’ll own the top of the sales funnel—qualifying inbound product-led leads, engaging high-potential free/paid customers, and driving outbound conversations informed by our PLG funnel data. This role is key to our growth in the Web3 ecosystem and offers a path to grow quickly in a rapidly evolving space.

What You’ll Do

 - Engage inbound PLG leads by identifying certain signals.

 - Conduct strategic outbound prospecting to Web3-native teams and crypto-adjacent companies, using insights from QuickNode’s inbound funnel to prioritize high-value targets.

 - Qualify inbound leads from blockchain projects, DAO contributors, NFT communities, and other decentralized orgs, ensuring a strong fit with our value levers (scalability, reliability, support).

 - Meet with developers, founders, and ecosystem leads to understand their technical goals and growth trajectory.

 - Book and confirm high-quality discovery meetings by applying frameworks like BANT and/or MEDDICC.

 - Collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Marketing to refine PLG-driven messaging and expansion strategies tailored to different Web3 verticals (DeFi, NFTs, L2s, infra).

 - Share customer product feedback and usage patterns with internal teams to help shape product roadmap and growth playbooks.

 - Regularly track outreach, funnel activity, and customer upgrade signals in CRM (e.g., Salesforce).

 - Meet or exceed KPIs related to qualified pipeline, expansion opportunities, and product-led conversion rates.

What You’ll Bring

 - 2+ years of sales or business development experience—ideally with Web3, blockchain infrastructure, developer tools, or SaaS with a PLG model.

 - Familiarity with PLG motions (self-serve to enterprise), and an understanding of triggers like usage limits, multi-team adoption, or support needs.

 - Passion for Web3 and knowledge of major ecosystems like Ethereum, Solana, L2s, and emerging protocols.

 - A track record of success in outbound sales, inbound qualification, or demand generation.

 - Strong communication skills with the ability to speak credibly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

source_jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Quicknode is a cloud-based infrastructure company that powers the blockchain ecosystem.

Our mission is to be the indispensable utility that empowers companies and innovators globally to build next-generation, Web3 enabled businesses & applications using blockchain technology. Quicknode is backed by some of the world's best investors including Tiger Global, Y Combinator, SoftBank, and the Seven Seven Six Fund. The Quicknode team has over 120 people maintaining high performance global data infrastructure for amazing customers serving billions of requests daily.

We are a global remote company with an HQ in Miami, Florida.


THE ROLE

As a Technical Support Engineer, you will be working on everything from answering simple support requests from potential customers about our service to setting up a local proxy to debug outgoing Web3 requests. You will be responsible for ensuring that we provide resolutions to customers quickly and when that is not possible, translate customer hardships into actionable items for our developer team to fix. Our network is servicing more than 10 billion requests per month, so you will be crucial in debugging the core issues customers are having with the use of custom software, off-the-shelf tooling, and more. You won’t be alone because we expect every Engineer to spend time on customer support, on a rotating basis, to understand our customers better.

We’re looking for a self-starter, who is communication-focused with a deep sense of ownership and a team mentality to collaborate on achieving high-quality customer experience. We’re looking for an individual who does not need constant supervision to track issues, reproduce customer issues, etc. You can expect to meet on a daily basis to go over customer issues, task progress and design solutions.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Have handled customer support in a technical capacity.

 - Worked on a remote team of 5-10 people.

 - Written scripts to figure out why some technical thing is not working.

 - Managed refunds, credits and charges in Stripe.

 - Lead a customer support team in a technical capacity.


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 1+ years of experience in a technical support role.

 - 1+ year of experience in Blockchain (or personal project equivalent).

 - Advanced scripting in more than one of the following languages: Python, GoLang, Ruby, Bash.

 - Internet core protocol knowledge: DNS, TCP/SSL, HTTP, etc.

 - The Ethereum JSON RPC spec: https://eth.wiki/json-rpc/API.

 - Experience in maintaining infrastructure as code (Terraform and preferably Ansible, but experience in Salt, Puppet or Chef is acceptable).

 - Expertise in managing Linux hosts.

 - Experience with proactive alerting and monitoring systems technologies.

 - Dealing with technical customer support (troubleshooting, CLI tools, Linux).

 - Adept at setting up software you may be unfamiliar with.

 - Being extremely thorough in debugging and documenting issues for other teams.

 - Capable of preemptively solving complex problems prior to their impacting multiple customers.

 - Used to documenting your processes and sharing knowledge.

The Quicknode compensation philosophy includes pillars to ensure fair and unbiased compensation for all employees. To design and deliver total reward offerings that are employee-centric. To offer a competitive benefit package in all locations where we operate. To prioritize attracting and retaining the best talent globally. To maintain a high-performing and flexible way of working.

During the hiring process, we are committed to discussing compensation openly and honestly. We encourage candidates to share their salary expectations and requirements early, allowing for an individualized discussion. We know that our total rewards practices impact the lives and wellbeing of our employees. Therefore, we will never stop learning about the market, our business, your needs, and how best to achieve our goals through thoughtful and data-driven practices. If you have any questi

notes: Quicknode is a blockchain infrastructure company with a strong focus on sales and business development.
